title: phegopteris ornata
intro: Phegopteris ornata, also known as the variegated lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is prized for its ornamental value due to its distinctive variegated fronds and is often used in gardens and indoor spaces. The medicinal properties of Phegopteris ornata include its ability to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as diabetes and arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions that promote digestion and relieve symptoms of menopause, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever and skin conditions.
